notes: OpenAI model card: GPT-5.5 released 2026-04-23 with knowledge cutoff 2025-12-01. Same base used for thinking variant.
OpenAI model card: knowledge cutoff Aug 31 2025; released 2026-03-06. Note: in-API system prompt has been reported to mis-state cutoff as 2024-06 (known bug).
OpenAI model card: GPT-5.3 chat / Codex variant released 2026-02-24 with cutoff Aug 31 2025.
Claude Opus 4.6 system card (Feb 2026); released 2026-02-05 with 'reliable knowledge cutoff' of May 2025.
Anthropic announcement; Sonnet 4.6 released 2026-02-17 with reliable knowledge cutoff August 2025.
Vertex AI docs: Gemini 3.1 Pro preview released 2026-02-19; inherits Gemini 3 family knowledge cutoff Jan 2025.
Gemini 3 Flash Preview (Reasoning) released 2025-12-17 with Jan 2025 knowledge cutoff.
Gemini 2.5 Pro released 2025-03-24 (experimental preview), GA later in 2025; knowledge cutoff Jan 2025 per Google model card.

DeepSeek V4 model card (publication 2026-04-27). V4 Pro released 2026-04-22/24. Knowledge cutoff approximate; secondary sources cite 'Apr 2026' (likely training-end, not data-end); pre-training data plausibly cuts off Q1 2026.
Released alongside V4 Pro on 2026-04-24; shares the same 32T-token pre-training corpus. Explicit knowledge cutoff not documented; estimated from sibling model.
Amazon Bedrock model card: V3.2 released 2025-12-01 with knowledge cutoff Mar 2025. (V3.2-Exp preview was 2025-09-29.)
Released 2026-02-16. Official knowledge cutoff not publicly documented; estimate from sibling Qwen3-Next (Sept 2025) and 3-month training-to-release lag. Approximate.

Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 released 2025-07-25. Knowledge cutoff not officially published; community testing shows Qwen3 series treats events from mid-2024 as future, with practical cutoff likely Apr-Oct 2024. Some secondary sources cite June 2025, but this is unverified; using conservative practical cutoff.
Qwen3-32B released 2025-04-29 as part of Qwen3 family launch. Knowledge cutoff not officially documented; community-tested practical cutoff appears around 2024-04. Approximate.
Qwen3-8B released 2025-04-29 with Qwen3 family. Knowledge cutoff officially 'unknown' (TBD); community tests suggest practical cutoff in early-to-mid 2024. Approximate.

Z.ai GLM-5.1 API released 2026-03-27, open-source 2026-04-07. Explicit knowledge cutoff not documented; estimated based on post-training date Feb 2026 and typical 2-month lag from pre-training data end.
GLM-4.7 released 2025-12-22 by Z.ai. Explicit knowledge cutoff not published; estimated ~3 months before release.
GLM-4-32B-0414 released 2025-04-17 with knowledge cutoff June 30 2024 per HuggingFace model card.
Kimi K2.6 released 2026-04-20 by Moonshot AI. Knowledge cutoff April 2025 per secondary sources; original Moonshot model card does not explicitly publish this.
Kimi K2 base released 2025-07-11; K2-Instruct-0905 update released 2025-09-09. Explicit cutoff not published; pre-training on 15.5T tokens reportedly ends around late 2024. Approximate.
Baidu ERNIE 4.5 series open-sourced 2025-06-30 with knowledge cutoff March 31 2025.
MiniMax M2.7 released 2026-03-18 (supersedes M2.5 from Feb 2026). Official knowledge cutoff not published; estimated ~5 months before release based on industry norms. Approximate.
Meta Llama 3.1 8B Instruct released 2024-07-23 with pretraining cutoff December 2023.
Meta Llama 3.2 1B released 2024-09-25 with pretraining cutoff December 2023 (same as Llama 3.1).
Meta Llama 3.3 70B Instruct released 2024-12-06 with pretraining cutoff December 2023.
Llama 4 Maverick (17B active / ~400B total MoE) released 2025-04-05 with knowledge cutoff August 2024.
Mistral Large 2411 (Large 2.1) released 2024-11-19 with knowledge cutoff July 31 2024.
Mistral Medium 3.1 (2508) released 2025-08-12 with training data cutoff May 2025.
Mistral Small 3 (24B Instruct 2501) released 2025-01-30 with knowledge cutoff October 2023 (carried over from earlier Mistral pre-training corpus).

Ministral 3 3B (2512 variant) released 2025-12-02. Explicit cutoff not in model card; HaoooWang LLM cutoff registry lists Ministral 3 family as 2023-10 (same as Mistral Small). Approximate; carry-over assumption.
Gemma 3 (1B/4B/12B/27B) released 2025-03-12 with pretraining data cutoff August 2024.
Gemma 3 12B released 2025-03-12 with pretraining data cutoff August 2024.
Gemma 4 31B released 2026-04-02 with pre-training dataset cutoff January 2025.
Grok 4 released 2025-07-09 with knowledge cutoff November 2024 (shared with Grok 3).
Grok 4.20 beta released 2026-02-17, API GA 2026-03-10. Knowledge cutoff Sept 1 2025 per OpenRouter listing (newer than Grok 4's Nov 2024 cutoff).
Microsoft Phi-4 released 2024-12-12 with training data cutoff June 2024 (per technical report). Note: model self-reports October 2023 in some prompts (known issue).
OpenAI gpt-oss-20b released 2025-08-05 with knowledge cutoff June 2024 per official model card.
